---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for PetZonic
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Problem / Motivation
A clear description of the problem this feature would solve.
Example: "As a buyer, I'm frustrated when..."

## Proposed Solution
A clear description of what you want to happen.

## User Story
> As a [role], I want [feature] so that [benefit].

## Alternatives Considered
Other solutions or features you've considered.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2

## Additional Context
Add mockups, screenshots, or links to related issues.
